metadata.description: Evaluation dataset for CLM AI — retrieval, generation, and end-to-end tests

retrieval_tests.description: Should retrieve NDA confidentiality clause text
Should retrieve termination clauses across contract types

retrieval_tests.query: service credits and penalties for SLA breach

chat_tests.question: What does a limitation of liability clause mean?
What are the key differences between an NDA and an MSA?
What should I look for in an SLA before signing?
Explain the risks of a non-compete clause
What is a force majeure clause and when does it apply?

analyse_tests.question: What does the limitation of liability clause mean?
Summarize the termination clause
analyse_tests.document_text: TERMINATION: Either party may terminate this agreement upon 30 days written notice. In the event of material breach, the non-breaching party may terminate immediately upon written notice. Upon termination, all confidential information must be returned within 15 business days.

analyse_tests.question: What are the risks in this indemnification clause?
analyse_tests.document_text: INDEMNIFICATION: The Service Provider shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Client from any and all claims, damages, losses, costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising from or related to the Service Provider's negligence, willful misconduct, or breach of this Agreement. This indemnification obligation shall survive the termination or expiration of this Agreement.

analyze_text_tests.text: This Service Level Agreement is entered into between CloudHost Inc (Service Provider) and DataCorp (Client). Service Provider guarantees 99.95% monthly uptime. If uptime falls below 99.9%, Client receives a 10% service credit. If uptime falls below 99.0%, Client receives a 25% service credit. Maximum monthly credit shall not exceed 30% of monthly fees. Support is available 24/7 via phone, email, and chat. P1 incidents must be resolved within 1 hour.

AGREEMENT: Party A agrees to provide all services requested by Party B at Party B's sole discretion. Party A assumes all liability for any damages regardless of fault. Party A waives all rights to dispute resolution. This agreement is perpetual and irrevocable.

contracts.title: Vendor Agreement A
contracts.text: EXCLUSIVITY: Vendor shall be the sole and exclusive provider of cloud infrastructure services to Client. Client shall not engage any other vendor for similar services during the term of this agreement. TERM: This agreement shall remain in effect for 3 years from the effective date.

contracts.title: Vendor Agreement B
contracts.text: SERVICES: Vendor B shall provide cloud infrastructure and hosting services to Client on a non-exclusive basis. Client retains the right to engage multiple vendors for similar services. TERM: This agreement is effective for 2 years.

conflict_detection_tests.description: Exclusivity conflict between two vendor agreements

contracts.title: Contract X
contracts.text: GOVERNING LAW: This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of New York County.

contracts.title: Contract Y
contracts.text: GOVERNING LAW: This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of California. All disputes shall be submitted to binding arbitration in San Francisco.

conflict_detection_tests.description: Conflicting governing law and dispute resolution

turns.question: What are the typical clauses in one?
turns.context_dependency: Should understand 'one' refers to NDA from previous turn

turns.question: How long do they usually last?

session_continuity_tests.description: Multi-turn conversation about NDAs — tests session memory
